title: Diffusion Model Training Step
interaction_flow: DiffusionModel: broadcast data_batch keys across TP/CP groups via _broadcast()
DiffusionModel: broadcast latent_state and condition across TP/CP groups
ImageDiffusionModel → DiffusionModel: compute_loss_with_epsilon_and_sigma(data_batch, x0_from_data_batch, x0, condition, epsilon, sigma)
DiffusionModel: disable/enable context parallel (CP) on net based on image/video batch
DiffusionModel: split_inputs_cp(x0, epsilon) if CP enabled
ImageDiffusionModel → SDE: sde.marginal_prob(x0, sigma)  [returns mean, std]
ImageDiffusionModel: xt = mean + batch_mul(std, epsilon)  [noisy observation]
ImageDiffusionModel → EDMScaling: scaling(sigma)  [returns c_skip, c_out, c_in, c_noise]
ImageDiffusionModel → DiTNet: net(x=batch_mul(c_in, xt), timesteps=c_noise, **condition.to_dict())  [forward pass]
ImageDiffusionModel: x0_pred = batch_mul(c_skip, xt) + batch_mul(c_out, net_output)
ImageDiffusionModel: kendall_loss = edm_loss (with optional logvar uncertainty weighting)
DiffusionModel: scale kendall_loss by CP world size if sum-reduce and CP > 1
DiffusionModel → ImageDiffusionModel: return (output_batch, kendall_loss, pred_mse, edm_loss)
ImageDiffusionModel: reduce kendall_loss (mean or sum) * loss_scale
Trainer → DiffusionModel: on_after_backward()  [calls finalize_model_grads → allreduce layernorm grads]
key_data_structures: CosmosCondition: dataclass {crossattn_emb, crossattn_mask, padding_mask, scalar_feature, data_type}
data_batch: dict with input_data_key (video) or input_image_key (image) + conditioning fields
output_batch: dict with x0, xt, sigma, weights, condition, model_pred, mse_loss, edm_loss
key_relationships: DiffusionModel (video) training_step only updates data records then calls super()
DiffusionModel has: SDE, Sampler, EDMScaling, VAE, net (DiT), conditioner, logvar_net, model_ema
EDM loss formulation: EDM paper (Karras et al., 2022) preconditioning (c_skip, c_out, c_in, c_noise)
Video noise multiplier: sqrt(num_temporal_frames) when adjust_video_noise=True
CP (context parallel) splits x0 and epsilon along temporal dim (seq_dim=2) for video
important_notes: Two-level inheritance: video DiffusionModel wraps image DiffusionModel. Training step in Trainer handles grad accumulation, mixed-precision (GradScaler), DDP sync, and optimizer step externally. Trainer also triggers callbacks at each sub-step. Loss supports 'mean' and 'sum' reduce modes with optional loss_scale. Kendall loss adds logvar uncertainty term when config.loss_add_logvar=True.
